name: Horizontal Filters
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure horizontal filter layouts to display filtering options across the top of search results rather than in a traditional sidebar, creating a different visual hierarchy for your product pages. This layout approach can be particularly effective for stores with specific filter sets that benefit from prominent horizontal display."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Horizontal filter layouts offer an alternative presentation style that can help improve filter visibility and accessibility, particularly on certain screen sizes or for stores with limited filter options. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This configuration flexibility enables you to optimize your search interface to match your specific catalog structure and customer browsing patterns."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DA6PUW5KJD38/5bec531-horizontal-filters.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DA6PUW5KJD38/5bec531-horizontal-filters.png", "name": "5bec531-Horizontal_Filters.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 653375, "width": 1663, "height": 829, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FDA6PUW5KJD38%2F5bec531-horizontal-filters.png", "mediaID": 1082, "dateInserted": "2025-10-21T18:34:24+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Horizontal filters provide an alternative layout for presenting filter options, offering a streamlined and space-efficient approach. This documentation guides you through the process of transforming vertical filters into horizontal filters within Merchandising Cloud's (formerly Findify's) app for Shopify merchants."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Q7AT9IVUY473/4a95107-horizontal-filters-2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Q7AT9IVUY473/4a95107-horizontal-filters-2.png", "name": "4a95107-Horizontal_Filters_2.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 94481, "width": 1844, "height": 546, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FQ7AT9IVUY473%2F4a95107-horizontal-filters-2.png", "mediaID": 1083, "dateInserted": "2025-10-21T18:34:53+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Instructions"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Configure\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid-search.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid-search.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file, locate the\u00a0"}, {"text": "div#findify-search-main", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0element."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add the attribute\u00a0"}, {"text": "data-template='horizontal'", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to this element."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Wrap filter and sorting into the\u00a0"}, {"text": "div.findify-filters_horizontal", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0section."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
{% render 'findify-loader' %}
{% render 'findify-filters' , component_id: findify_filters_component_id, , active_filters: active_filters , color_layout: color_layout %}
{% render 'findify-sorting', options: sort_options, default: default_sort_by, selected: sort_by, is_modal: false %}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Adjust\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-toolbar-desktop.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Remove the below sorting block code from the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-toolbar-desktop.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
{% render 'findify-sorting' , options: sort_options , default: default_sort_by , selected: sort_by , is_modal: false %}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "yaml"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Update CSS Styles"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file, add the below CSS code."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ".findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] { flex-direction: column;}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-filter.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file, add the below CSS code."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "/* horizontal filters */.findify-filters-checkbox-item-value > span,.findify-filters--checkbox-nested-value > span { text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; white-space: normal;}.price-range-input { max-width: 45px;}@media (min-width: 768px) { #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] { width: 100%; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters-wrapper { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] #shopify-section-findify-filter-group { width: 210px; position: relative; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters--body { position: absolute; background: white; z-index: 10; top: 100%; width: 100%; padding: 14px 0 5px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters--body-wrapper { max-height: 220px; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters--body-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters--body-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #000000; border-radius: 2px; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters-container { border-bottom: none; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filter-group { border-bottom: 1px solid #d7d9d6; height: 46px; justify-content: flex-end; } .findify-search-header-toolbar .findify-search-header-toolbar-actions { display: none; } .findify-filters_horizontal { display: flex; } #findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-sorting-body { white-space: nowrap; } .findify-search-header-toolbar { justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 26px; }}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 4: Update\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-filter-group.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Change the\u00a0"}, {"text": "aria-expanded", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0attribute from\u00a0"}, {"text": "\"true\"", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to\u00a0"}, {"text": "\"false\"", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0in\u00a0"}, {"text": "div.findify-filters-body", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add the class\u00a0"}, {"text": ".findify-filters-container", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to the\u00a0"}, {"text": ".findify-filter-group", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0element."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Update\u00a0"}, {"text": "collapseFilter", "code": true}, {"text": "function"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}]}], "lang": "xml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By following these steps and integrating the provided code snippets, you can seamlessly transform vertical filters into horizontal filters, enhancing the usability and aesthetics of your Shopify store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:aupport@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
